scripts.build: npm run build --workspace viewer && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.desktop:bootstrap: python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip && python3 -m pip install -r backend/requirements-clinical.txt && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace frontend && npm run type-check --workspace viewer
